command: cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && echo '=== ENV FILES ===' && for f in ~/security/hyo.env ~/security/.env ~/.config/hyo/env; do test -f "$f" && echo "EXISTS: $f" && grep -c KEY "$f" 2>/dev/null; done && echo '=== SYNTH BACKENDS ===' && which claude 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && env | grep -i 'GROK\|ANTHROPIC\|OPENAI' 2>/dev/null | sed 's/=.*/=***/' && echo '=== LAUNCHD AETHER ENV ===' && plutil -p ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.hyo.aurora.plist 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'key\|env' | head -10
